items.name: Healing Potion
items.description: This is pretty much the best healing potion in any videogame ever. One use per spawn.

items.name: Korblox Mage Staff
items.description: Use the powerful dark magic of the Korblox to summon a row of spears from thin air!  If they don't hit your opponent on the way down, they'll hit them as they explode!

items.name: Starblox Latte
items.description: Drinking a Starblox Latte is a great way to add a little speed to your step - but if you drink too many your head might explode.

items.name: ninjabart122's ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: ninjabart122. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: Claymore
items.description: Favored sword of the McBlox clan.

items.name: Body Swap Potion
items.description: Ever wanted to see what it was like to live as someone else?  Wonder no more!

items.name: Mr. Whiskers
items.description: A faithful feline friend to the end. Toss his favorite skeleton fish and he'll fetch it back.  When not fetching; he follows you around the map like a loyal pet.

items.name: Subspace Tripmine
items.description: WARNING: HIGH EXPLOSIVE DEVICE. When triggered, this devastating weapon rips a gashing hole in the fabric of reality - subsequent spacetime reification results in a large explosion. USE: Drop mine. Once the mine stops moving, it will enter subspace and become invisible. At this point the mine is armed. Touching the mine will set it off...

items.name: Throwing Spork
items.description: For the suburban ninja in all of us.  Throw these sporks at opponents for a laugh.

items.name: From the Vault: Dozens of Dinosaurs
items.description: From the vault of interns past, ROBLOX brings you - dozens of dinosaurs! Sharksie's pack of dinos spawns 14 plushie dinos for you to enjoy.

items.name: Slateskin Potion
items.description: Ingredients: one part dust from the oldest mountain, two parts dirt from the deepest sea, three parts lava from the core of the earth, and one splinter from the Rock of Prometheus. Drinking this potion transforms your skin into rock, allowing you to take more damage than the average Robloxian. It also makes you heavier, which will slow you down slightly.

items.name: Marshmallow Shooter
items.description: They're not just for eating anymore. Click to fire toasty treats.

items.name: Attack Doge
items.description: So enemies. Much bark. Wow. For those of you that don't speak doge, click on an enemy to send your attack doge after them!  His bark is worse than his bite- because he doesn't bite! Wow.

items.name: Rainbow Periastron Omega
items.description: The sword men use to fight angry magical unicorns... in space.

items.name: Ultimate Drive Speedster
items.description: Click to spawn the vehicle. Then, hop into the driver's seat and speed away! Includes two passenger seats.

items.name: Skeleton Scythe
items.description: Swing at your enemies to do 20 damage per hit.  Press "E" three times to summon a small army.

items.name: Hot Chocolate
items.description: Warms you up on a snowy day!

items.name: Darkest Arts Sword
items.description: A dark magic possesses this sword. Use it as a sword or use its dark magic to destroy the artifacts of others.

items.name: Hyperlaser Gun
items.description: Everyone knows that blue is the fastest color laser beam. That's why it's a one hit KO.

items.name: Sword of the Epicredness
items.description: Click to slash, dealing 16 to 22 damage. Hit the 'Q' key, to shoot red flames out in all directions, which will slow your enemies and deal 25 additional damage!  The sword sends out an explosive neon red orb from its center which quickly expands and explodes. Anybody caught in the explosion is dealt 40 damage.

items.name: Skeleton Foam Finger
items.description: Grab this foam finger by the bone!

items.name: Moneybag
items.description: Rich people like to carry these around and shake them, leaving a trail of money behind them.

items.name: Red Rolling Hoverboard
items.description: Click to spawn your very own hoverboard! Control your direction using arrow keys or the 'W', 'A', 'S', and 'D' keys. Hit Backspace to dismount.

items.name: April Showers
items.description: I'm told they bring May flowers... or was it they may bring flowers?

items.name: Evil Knight Sword
items.description: This blade draws power from the user, its cursed blade growing stronger as the wielder is lost to despair.

items.name: Skelefriend
items.description: They see him swirlin', They hatin'

items.name: Portable Beach
items.description: One click and you're on an instant beach vacation... complete with sand castle!

items.name: Flashbang
items.description: All players within 64 studs of the detonation point are blinded for several seconds. Use them to your advantage!

items.name: Icy Arctic Fowl
items.description: He may be fowl, but he's your friend.  Shoots painful iceblasts that do 25 damage to anyone near you.  Don't get too close to the Phoenix though, he'll melt your frozen friend.

items.name: Decoy Deploy
items.description: Makes a copy of the best thing ever - you!
